examples: The enemy seemed stunned by the suddenness of the attack.
The suddenness of storms in that climate is something almost preternatural.
I know the suddenness of it must have been a dreadful shock; and I just can't tell you how sorry I am.
The suddenness with which he spoke suggested he was defending himself against his feelings.
But it does change what we regard as smart and stupid, sometimes with discomforting suddenness.
